allow: Bash(git init && git add . && git commit -m "Initial commit — English Sounds phonogram PWA")
Bash(git remote add origin https://github.com/michaelcase93/english-sounds.git && git branch -M main && git push -u origin main)

Bash(git add public/apple-touch-icon.png && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add apple-touch-icon for iOS home screen install

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add src/App.jsx src/index.css && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix bottom nav layout and safe-area cutoff on iOS PWA

- Use flex-1 min-h-0 instead of h-full so nav stays fixed outside scroll
- Remove duplicate safe-area-inset-bottom from html \(BottomNav handles it\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add src/components/BottomNav.jsx src/App.jsx src/pages/Browse.jsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix bottom nav: use fixed positioning instead of fragile flex chain

Makes BottomNav position: fixed so it always sits at the bottom regardless
of page scroll. Simplifies StudentLayout and Browse to not rely on h-full
through nested flex containers, which is unreliable on iOS PWA.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add src/components/PhonogramButton.jsx src/data/phonograms.js && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Reorganize phonograms into mom's 4-group structure

- Renamed groups: Common Sounds \(blue\), Advanced Sounds \(purple\), Final Core Sounds \(orange\)
- Reordered phonograms within each group to match mom's handwritten layout
- Moved ck → Common Sounds, ng/eigh/dge → Advanced Sounds, oe/ough → Final Core Sounds
- Deleted all 16 Group 5 phonograms \(ce, ve, se, ze, ge, me, ne, re, te, le, be, de, fe, ke, pe, ue\)
- Updated group4 button color from teal to orange

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add src/pages/Browse.jsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix double scroll and tab bar vertical drift on Browse page

- Replace min-h-screen with height:100dvh so the page is viewport-bounded
- Add flex-1 to content div so overflow-y-auto has a bounded height to scroll within
- Add touch-action:pan-x to tab bar so horizontal swipes don't cause vertical movement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main)

Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix admin scroll, quiz enhancements, browse scroll cutoff, nav URL

- Fix /admin/record and /admin/audio scroll on iOS Safari: useEffect removes
  overflow:hidden from #root while on admin pages, restoring natural scroll
- Quiz: Got It sound, 5-in-a-row confetti + celebration popup, fix 'Listening'
  label on new cards, add back-to-menu button on all quiz modes
- Browse: increase bottom padding to fix last sounds cut off on mobile
- Rename group4 label 'Final Core Sounds' -> 'Additional Sounds'
- Change /browse route to /sounds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Quiz cleanup: tooltips, subtitle, stats layout, group filter, color swaps

- Quiz subtitle: "What do you want to practice?"
- Stat categories: number large above label, tooltip definitions on ℹ tap
- Group filter tabs on quiz page with group-scoped stats
- Alphabet consonants → blue, Common Sounds → red
- Quiz card symbol font changed to match sounds page \(Inter\)
- Admin scroll fix: useEffect lifts overflow:hidden on #root
- Browse bottom padding fix for iOS safe area cutoff

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)
